description: OmniFocus MCP server returned a completed task (PGA Tour tickets, marked done prior week) as active/uncompleted during boot pull. get_active_tasks is supposed to filter completed tasks. This is a MCP sync reliability issue that produced incorrect briefing data.
correction: OmniFocus MCP data cannot be treated as fully authoritative. Known sync lag exists between OmniFocus app state and MCP layer.
systemic_fix: When executive disputes any task status, re-pull before responding. Flag OmniFocus MCP sync reliability as a known data quality risk.
